options.blogdescription: Where great design is brought back to life.

steps.code:
'Case Files', 'post_name' => 'workshop-checklist', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => '', )); $c = '

The Design Morgue — Case Files

'; $c .= '

Five specimens. Five preventable deaths. Examine each exhibit, diagnose the crime, and attempt resuscitation. You are the forensic designer now.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit A — The Mutilated Logo

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: Excessive whitespace around the logo mark. The brand drowns in its own canvas. Nobody sees the name — they see emptiness.

'; $c .= ''; $c .= ''; $c .= '

Your task: Visit the home page and look at the header — the logo is drowning in whitespace. Then click "Edit Site" in the top bar, select the logo in the header, and replace it with the properly cropped version from the Media Library (search for "Cropped"). Compare how the header looks before and after.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit B — The Accent Color Massacre

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: Everything is highlighted. When every element screams for attention, nothing gets it. The eye has nowhere to land.

'; $c .= '

Your task: Visit the home page and count how many elements are red — buttons, headings, everything is competing. Then click "Edit Site," open the home page template, and remove the accent color from all but one element: the single most important call-to-action. Compare how your eye moves through the page before and after.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit C — The Pale Witness

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: A low-resolution image used at full width. The pixels are visible. The brand looks cheap.

'; $c .= '

Your task: Visit the home page and look at the full-width image — zoom in if you can. Notice the visible pixel blocks. Then click "Edit Site," select the featured image on the home page, and replace it with the high-resolution version from the Media Library (search for "HD"). Compare how the brand feels before and after.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit D — The Void

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: No breathing room. Text and elements are compressed together, creating visual claustrophobia. The layout communicates panic, not elegance.

'; $c .= '

Your task: Visit the home page and notice how the hero and the bottom section feel compressed — text almost touching the edges, no room to breathe. Then click "Edit Site," select the dark hero group and the light CTA group, and increase the padding to at least 60px top and bottom on each. Compare how the page feels before and after.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit E — The Palette Paradox

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: The wrong background for the content type. Dark backgrounds reduce eye strain in long reading sessions. White backgrounds aid legibility for text-heavy layouts. Neither is wrong — but they are not interchangeable.

'; $c .= '

Your task: Visit the home page and take in the overall palette — does the light background feel right for this brand? Then click "Edit Site" and open the Styles panel (the half-circle icon, top right). Switch the background to dark and visit the home page again. Switch back to light. Decide which palette actually serves this content and note why.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Your Conclusions

'; $c .= '

Close the tab when you are done. The morgue does not keep records — only lessons.

'; wp_update_post(array('ID' => $cid, 'post_content' => $c)); // --- Home page with deliberate design crimes --- $hid = wp_insert_post(array( 'post_title' => 'Home', 'post_name' => 'home', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => '', )); $h = file_get_contents('/wordpress/home-page.html'); $h = str_replace('{{UPLOADS}}', content_url('uploads'), $h); wp_update_post(array('ID' => $hid, 'post_content' => $h)); // Set home page as front page update_option('show_on_front', 'page'); update_option('page_on_front', $hid); // Register images in media library and set site logo $base = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/'; $images = array( array('logo-cropped.png', 'VITAL Logo (Cropped)', 'image/png'), array('logo-uncropped.jpg', 'VITAL Logo (Uncropped)', 'image/jpeg'), array('specimen-lowres.jpg', 'VITAL Campaign Shot', 'image/jpeg'), array('specimen-hires.jpg', 'VITAL Campaign Shot HD', 'image/jpeg'), array('banner.jpg', 'Design Morgue Workshop Banner', 'image/jpeg'), ); foreach ($images as $img) { $id = wp_insert_attachment(array( 'post_title' => $img[1], 'post_mime_type' => $img[2], 'post_status' => 'inherit', ), $base . $img[0], 0); if ('logo-uncropped.jpg' === $img[0]) { update_option('site_logo', $id); } } echo 'done';
